The Agfa s DR 800 system is indicated for performing dynamic imaging examinations (fluoroscopy and/or rapid sequence) of the following an anatomies/procedures: positioning fluoroscopy procedures, gastro-intestinal examinations, urogenital tract examinations, and angiography.
